name: Automate responses to business emails with ChatGPT and Google Sheets (draft emails)

parameters.name: markSeen
parameters.label: Mark message(s) as read when fetched

messages.content:
Please categorize the following email '{{1.text}}' into one of these categories:
- Inquiry/Requests
- Complaints/Issues
- Job Applications/Resumes

Only output the category and no other text.

spreadsheetId.label: Business emails categories and prompts - template

messages.content:
{{6.`1`}} {{1.text}}

Address it to the sender's first name: {{1.from.name}}
Ensure that the email body is in HTML format with the correct line and paragraph breaks.

Do not add any text before the 'Dear'.

Do not add a signature like 'Best regards,

[Your Name] 
Customer Support Specialist  
[Company Name]' or 'The Make team'.

Do not add 'Subject: Re: '

Only output the email from 'Dear...'
Just a reminder, always output the email body in HTML and never include the words/text '''html' before the greeting: 'Dear'.

select.label: Create a Chat Completion (GPT and o1 models)
